title: Supreme Court Collegium recommends four Telangana High Court judges be made permanent
description: The Supreme Court Collegium has recommended that four judges appointed to the Telangana High Court in 2025 be made permanent. The decision was taken at a meeting of the Collegium held on Tuesday.The Additional Judges recommended for permanent appointment are: - Justice Yara Renuka;- Justice Nandikonda Narsing Rao;- Justice E Tirumala Devi; and- Justice BR Madhusudhan Rao.The Telangana High Court, which has a sanctioned strength of 42, is currently functioning with 28 judges, a vacancy posit
